title: Spanish Wrap
description: A vegetarian wrap filled with the flavors of Spain. Enjoy this simple and delicious meal for a quick lunch or snack.
instructions: Preheat a pan over medium heat.
Place the sliced briny olives in the pan and cook for 2-3 minutes.
Add the chopped fresh cilantro to the pan and cook for 1 minute.
Add the caramelized onions to the pan and cook for 1 minute.
Place the wrap in the pan and cook for 1 minute on each side, until crispy.
Transfer the wrap to a plate and top with the shredded Spanish cheddar cheese and mature cheddar cheese.
Fold the wrap in half and serve immediately.
